harness.js:103:4-114:6
> exec((cmd + pid), function(err, stdout, stderr) {
  if (err)   return done(err, null);
  stdout = stdout["split"](os["EOL"])[1];
  stdout = stdout["replace"]("/^\s+/", "")["replace"]("/\s\s+/g", " ")["split"](" ");
  return done(null, {cpu: parseFloat(stdout[0]["replace"](",", ".")), memory: (parseFloat(stdout[1]) * 1024)});
});

Reached sensitive command-injection sink 'child_process.exec' with symbolic expr:
(str.++ "ps -o pcpu,rss -p " payload)
